ucs.title: [LLM] FIN6/Skeleton Spider More_eggs delivery chain — LNK → ie4uinit.exe / msxsl.exe JScript proxy
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical FIN6 (Mandiant: Skeleton Spider, Microsoft: Camouflage Tempest) loader execution where a LNK extracted from a resume-themed ZIP spawns cmd.exe that abuses ie4uinit.exe (-BaseSettings flag), msxsl.exe, or regsvr32 /scrobj to execute the More_eggs (TerraLoader / VenomLNK) JScript backdoor. This LOLBin combo is a long-standing FIN6/Cobalt Group tradecraft signature distinct from generic JScript abuse.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where ((Processes.process_name=ie4uinit.exe AND Processes.process="*BaseSettings*") OR Processes.process_name=msxsl.exe OR (Processes.process_name=regsvr32.exe AND (Processes.process="*scrobj*" OR Processes.process="*/i:http*" OR Processes.process="*.sct*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN (wscript.exe,cscript.exe) AND Processes.process="*.js*")) AND Processes.parent_process_name IN (cmd.exe,explorer.exe,wmiprvse.exe) AND (Processes.parent_process="*\\Temp\\*" OR Processes.parent_process="*\\Downloads\\*" OR Processes.parent_process="*\\AppData\\Local\\*" OR Processes.parent_process="*.lnk*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where (FileName =~ "ie4uinit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_cs "BaseSettings")
     or FileName =~ "msxsl.exe"
     or (FileName =~ "regsvr32.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("scrobj", "/i:http", ".sct"))
     or (FileName in~ ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has ".js")
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("cmd.exe","explorer.exe","wmiprvse.exe")
| where InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any (".lnk","\\Temp\\","\\Downloads\\","\\AppData\\Local\\")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessParentFileName, SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.rationale: ie4uinit.exe -BaseSettings and msxsl.exe abuse to sideload JScript is a narrow, FIN6-attributed primitive documented across Mandiant/FireEye reporting for More_eggs deployment (Cobalt Group also overlaps). Constraining the parent to cmd.exe/explorer with a Temp/Downloads/.lnk command-line removes admin scripting noise and isolates the lure-driven Skeleton Spider chain rather than alerting on every

ucs.title: [LLM] FIN6 LinkedIn resume lure — cloud-hosted resume site → ZIP/LNK drop → script-host execution
ucs.description: Detects the FIN6 / Skeleton Spider social-engineering chain where a contractor or HR user is solicited via LinkedIn DM to a fake personal-portfolio site (typically AWS S3, CloudFront, or GitHub Pages) using resume/CV themed paths, downloads a resume-named ZIP/LNK, and within minutes spawns a JScript proxy. Correlates web egress + filesystem drop + script execution in one window — characteristic of FIN6's 2023-2025 access-broker operations.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as web_time from datamodel=Web where (Web.url="*s3.amazonaws.com*" OR Web.url="*cloudfront.net*" OR Web.url="*github.io*" OR Web.url="*azurewebsites.net*") AND (Web.url="*resume*" OR Web.url="*cv*" OR Web.url="*portfolio*" OR Web.url="*candidate*" OR Web.url="*applicant*") by Web.src Web.user Web.url | `drop_dm_object_name(Web)` | rename src as host | join type=inner host [ | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as file_time from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_name="*resume*.zip" OR Filesystem.file_name="*cv*.zip" OR Filesystem.file_name="*resume*.lnk" OR Filesystem.file_name="*application*.zip" OR Filesystem.file_name="*portfolio*.lnk") AND (Filesystem.file_path="*\\Downloads\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Temp\\*") by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.file_path | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | rename dest as host ] | join type=inner host [ | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as proc_time from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN (wscript.exe,cscript.exe,msxsl.exe,ie4uinit.exe,regsvr32.exe) AND Processes.parent_process_name IN (cmd.exe,explorer.exe) by Processes.dest Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as host ] | eval drop_lag=(file_time-web_time), exec_lag=(proc_time-file_time) | where drop_lag>=0 AND drop_lag<=1800 AND exec_lag>=0 AND exec_lag<=3600 | table host user url file_name file_path process_name process parent_process web_time file_time proc_time
ucs.kql:
let lure =
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where RemoteUrl has_any ("amazonaws.com","cloudfront.net","github.io","azurewebsites.net","web.app")
    | where RemoteUrl matches regex @"(?i)(resume|cv|portfolio|candidate|applicant|career|hire)"
    | project DeviceId, NetTime=Timestamp, RemoteUrl, NetProc=InitiatingProcessFileName;
let drop =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where FolderPath has_any ("\\Downloads\\","\\Temp\\","\\AppData\\Local\\")
    | where FileName matches regex @"(?i)(resume|cv|portfolio|application|candidate).*\.(zip|lnk|iso|img)$"
    | project DeviceId, FileTime=Timestamp, FileName, FolderPath;
let exec =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where (FileName =~ "ie4uinit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_cs "BaseSettings")
         or FileName in~ ("msxsl.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe")
         or (FileName =~ "regsvr32.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("scrobj","/i:http",".sct"))
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("cmd.exe","explorer.exe","7zG.exe","WinRAR.exe")
    | project DeviceId, ExecTime=Timestamp, ProcName=FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
lure
| join kind=inner drop on DeviceId
| where datetime_diff('minute', FileTime, NetTime) between (0 .. 30)
| join kind=inner exec on DeviceId
| where datetime_diff('minute', ExecTime, FileTime) between (0 .. 60)
| project NetTime, FileTime, ExecTime, DeviceId, RemoteUrl, FileName, FolderPath, ProcName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName
ucs.rationale: FIN6's pivot from POS skimming to access-broker ops is centered on bespoke LinkedIn outreach pointing at attacker-controlled resume sites on legitimate cloud CDNs (Mandiant Skeleton Spider 2024 reporting). Generic 'malicious download' rules miss this because the URL host is reputable AWS/CloudFront. Joining the resume-themed cloud URL, a resume-named archive in Downloads, and a script-host child o
